title: glechoma scordotis
intro: Glechoma scordotis, also known as Creeping Sage, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant in the mint family, native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Glechoma scordotis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of Glechoma scordotis typically involve infusion of the leaves in hot water, which can be used as a tea or added to other herbal remedies.
